signals.headline: US Blockade on Iranian Ports Takes Effect Amid Failed Ceasefire Talks; Trump Warns Iran of Severe Consequences | NO | HI
signals.raw:
US Blockade on Iranian Ports Takes Effect Amid Failed Ceasefire Talks; Trump Warns Iran of Severe Consequences | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

Recent developments confirm a US naval blockade on Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz is now active, following the collapse of face-to-face peace talks in Islamabad on Sunday, April 12, 2026[1][2][5]. Vice President J.D. Vance announced no agreement was
